redacted_request:
Request for external assistant:

Write an essay about a best friend named [Name] for a Class 2 student, focusing on friendly qualities and shared experiences. Please ensure the essay is simple, engaging, and appropriate for young children.
untrusted_response:
**My Best Friend, [Name]**

My best friend is [Name]. We are in the same class, and we play together during recess. [Name] is very kind and always shares his toys with me. When I feel sad, [Name] comes to sit next to me and makes me laugh. He is also very smart and helps me with my homework when I get stuck.

We like to play together after school. Sometimes we draw pictures, sometimes we build blocks, and other times we pretend to be superheroes. [Name] is very brave and never gives up, even when he tries something new. He always says, “I can do it!” and then he does!

[Name] is also very good at listening. If I tell him a secret, he keeps it safe. He is one of the nicest friends I have ever had. I love spending time with [Name], and I know that we will always be best friends.
final_response:
**My Best Friend, Sulaiman**

My best friend is Sulaiman. We are in the same class, and we play together during recess. Sulaiman is very kind and always shares his toys with me. When I feel sad, Sulaiman comes to sit next to me and makes me laugh. He is also very smart and helps me with my homework when I get stuck.

We like to play together after school. Sometimes we draw pictures, sometimes we build blocks, and other times we pretend to be superheroes. Sulaiman is very brave and never gives up, even when he tries something new. He always says, “I can do it!” and then he does!

Sulaiman is also very good at listening. If I tell him a secret, he keeps it safe. He is one of the nicest friends I have ever had. I love spending time with Sulaiman, and I know that we will always be best friends.
